cases.input: Implement reprinting so the old QR token becomes invalid and a replacement token is issued.
cases.expected_outcome: Use QR lifecycle state rules and require tests for old-token rejection.

cases.input: Design the reward catalog card for an Air Fryer prize.
The Browse button for contractor photo upload looks present but does not open the file picker when I click it.
cases.expected_outcome: Run Browser UAT against the exact URL, click the visible Browse control, verify file chooser behavior, inspect console/network errors, and confirm persisted readback after upload.

cases.input: The admin web page works in tests but not at http://127.0.0.1:3001 for the workflow I am using.
cases.expected_outcome: Verify exact URL parity, hydration, client chunk loading, CORS/fetch behavior, and visible-control workflow evidence.

cases.input: Add support for contractors canceling a redeemed reward before collecting it at the shop.
cases.expected_outcome: Restore points, recalculate eligibility, and write Balance Book entries.

cases.input: Verify STAFF cannot export QR printed reports but OWNER can share them as Excel.
cases.expected_outcome: Server-side deny test for STAFF export and allow test for OWNER.

cases.input: Map BUSY partial sale return data so later printing of Not Printed units is blocked for returned quantity.
cases.expected_outcome: Use mock adapter until real fields are provided and test partial return behavior.

cases.input: Before finishing the QR scan phase, check that tests, authorization, audit logging, and secret scanning are covered.
cases.expected_outcome: Run completion checklist and report residual risk.

cases.input: The admin dashboard works but looks generic and not like a thoughtfully designed 2026 application.
cases.expected_outcome: Review against the frontend experience standard, reference inputs, visual hierarchy, control placement, state design, and desktop/mobile screenshots.

cases.input: Before adding more mobile backend APIs, create a way to validate Contractor and Team Member auth, site selection, scan, and history screens.
cases.expected_outcome: Require a mobile experience contract and thin client shell so backend behavior can be validated through visible user journeys.

cases.input: Start building rewards redemption and Balance Book.
cases.expected_outcome: Bring forward reward catalog, tier, point availability, reward status, cancellation, negative balance, calculation base, and rounding questions before implementation.
Bring forward BUSY partial/full return samples, line matching, discount, GST, item master, and event push questions before implementation.

cases.input: Build the first end-user mobile shell using PayTM and PhonePe style design elements, with colors that can change later.
cases.expected_outcome: Use Indian payments-app UX patterns as inspiration only, define Volt Rewards theme tokens, avoid copied branding/assets, and verify polished mobile screens.

cases.input: The mobile app should have Hindi and English toggle from day one.
cases.expected_outcome: Add localization structure, visible language toggle, translated screen copy, and layout checks for both languages.

cases.input: Contractor should see all scan history but Team Member should only see scan history for sites they scanned or attempted.
cases.expected_outcome: Enforce scan-history visibility server-side and verify Contractor full history versus Team Member restricted history.

cases.input: Team Member login should show only one recent contractor after successful login and allow clearing it.
cases.expected_outcome: Store one secure local recent contractor only after OTP success, render a clear/remove control, and keep OTP mandatory.
